message:
feat(engine): add 10 new modules for gates, analysis, and orchestration

New modules expanding engine capabilities:

- attack_surface_game_model.rs (+158): Game-theoretic attack surface
  modeling with Nash equilibrium analysis for defense allocation
- control_plane/mod.rs (+151): Control plane abstraction layer for
  coordinating engine subsystems
- frankenlab_release_gate.rs (+138): Release gate enforcing lab
  validation requirements before promotion
- moonshot_contract.rs (+153): Contract type for speculative
  high-risk/high-reward engine optimizations with rollback support
- observability_channel_model.rs (+143): Structured channel model
  for observability data flow (metrics, traces, logs)
- service_endpoint_template.rs (+199): Template system for
  generating service endpoint configurations from policy
- runtime_diagnostics_cli.rs (+150): CLI interface for runtime
  diagnostic queries and health checks
- scheduler_lane.rs (+235): Lane-based task scheduling with
  priority inheritance and deadline monotonic ordering
- static_authority_analyzer.rs (+239): Static analysis of authority
  delegation chains for security auditing

lib.rs: Registers 4 new concurrent-agent modules:
bifurcation_boundary_scanner, counterfactual_replay_engine,
demo_claim_linkage_gate, rollback_safemode_synthesizer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
